description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build + Test that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a self-hosted job matrix with x64, ARMv8.0, and ARMv8.2 architectures to check out the repository, initialize submodules, clean and create a build environment, configure CMake with Release build type and specific flags, and then build and run various tests including ASM, IR, Posix, gvisor, and gcc target tests.
